node.statement: QED: At criticality H_2 = 1-r, the two bulk configs (all-e, all-s) are degenerate. A single domain wall can proliferate with weight ∝ N/L(t) = Ne^{-t/τ}/L_0 (multiplicity N, single DW cost). This is confirmed by the data collapse in Fig.2(b): curves for different N collapse when plotting |I_c^bw - I_c^RM|/k vs t, showing Ne^{-2t/τ} at early times and Ne^{-t/τ} at criticality.
